Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard P2P flow Create Purchase Requisition Approve PR Issue Purchase Order Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: key is that payment should not happen before goods receipt and invoice matching Also approvals should happen before PO issuance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Sequence Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Receive Goods Invoice Received Match Invoice Release Payment Close Thats correct order No anomaly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Sequence Create PR Issue PO Vendor Invoice Received Release Payment Approve PR Receive Goods Match Invoice Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Issue PO occurs before Approve PR approval after PO is unusual normally PR must be approved before PO can be issued

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Vendor Invoice Received and Release Payment happen before Approve PR Receive Goods and Match Invoice Payment before goods receipt and matching is a major anomaly

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This could indicate fraudulent or erroneous payment Also approval after payment is problematic So case 1002 has multiple anomalies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Sequence Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Release Payment Invoice Received Receive Goods Match Invoice Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Release Payment occurs before Invoice Received and before Receive Goods Thats paying before receiving goods and before even receiving invoice

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That is highly unusual and risky Payment should only be made after goods receipt and invoice matching Also after payment they later receive invoice and goods then match So anomaly premature payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Sequence Create PR Approve PR Receive Goods Issue PO Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice Release Payment Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receive Goods occurs before Issue PO Thats unusual because normally you issue PO first then supplier delivers goods

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receiving goods without a PO is problematic could be unordered goods Then they issue PO after goods receipt So anomaly goods receipt before PO issuance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus anomalies in cases 1002 1003 1004 Need to explain why problematic
